title: LuckyItems
description: LuckyItems is a Minecraft plugin that rewards players with random items when they break blocks, adding exciting surprises to mining and exploration. Players receive personal notifications when they get lucky!
body:
# LuckyItems - Random Reward System 🍀

Turn every block break into an exciting surprise!

## 🔹 Description
LuckyItems is a thrilling plugin that rewards players with random Minecraft items when they break blocks. Perfect for adding excitement to mining and resource gathering, it's a must-have for servers looking to enhance gameplay with unpredictable rewards.

## ✨ Key Features
✔ **True Randomization** – Any Minecraft item can drop  
✔ **Flexible Delivery** – Choose inventory or ground drops  
✔ **Wide Version Support** – Compatible with MC 1.13 through 1.21  
✔ **Personal Notifications** – Players see what they've won  
✔ **Balanced Gameplay** – Configurable drop rates  

## 📥 Installation
1. Download `LuckyItems.jar` and place in your `plugins/` folder
2. Restart your server - works instantly with default settings!
3. (Optional) Edit `plugins/LuckyItems/config.yml` to customize

## ⚙️ Configuration (config.yml)
```yaml
settings:
  give-directly: true    # Deliver to player inventory
  drop-on-ground: false  # Drop items at broken block
  drop-chance: 0.1       # 10% chance per block break
  message: "&6&lLUCKY! &eYou found: &b{item}"
```

## 🔑 Permissions
- `luckyitems.get` – Receive random items (default: true)
- `luckyitems.reload` – Reload configuration (op only)

## 🌟 Why Choose LuckyItems?
✅ **Instant Fun** – Adds excitement to routine activities  
✅ **Fully Customizable** – Control drop rates and delivery  
✅ **Lightweight** – Minimal impact on server performance  

## 🎯 Perfect For:
- **Survival Servers** – Add surprise rewards to mining
- **Economy Servers** – Use with Vault for money drops
- **Minigame Servers** – Create unique reward systems
- **All Server Types** – Any server wanting more player engagement

**Random ✔ Exciting ✔ Game-Changing ✔**

🔹 Watch your players' excitement grow with every block break!
